## Risk summary

Describe the risk without posting secrets, credentials, private lead/customer data, or exploit details.

## Affected area

- [ ] Cross-repo automation
- [ ] GitHub Actions workflow
- [ ] Fleet security rollout
- [ ] GitHub token / automation credential
- [ ] CRM / lead data
- [ ] Bot / AI automation
- [ ] Database / data export
- [ ] Dependency/package
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other:

## Risk level

- [ ] Low
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] High
- [ ] Critical

## Category

- [ ] Workflow configuration
- [ ] Permissions
- [ ] Dependency
- [ ] Language detection
- [ ] True vulnerability
- [ ] Quality/compliance
- [ ] Autonomous action risk

## Repositories affected


## Why it matters


## Immediate containment

- [ ] Pause risky automation
- [ ] Remove exposed data
- [ ] Rotate secrets
- [ ] Disable risky workflow
- [ ] Patch dependency
- [ ] Restrict access
- [ ] Review logs
- [ ] Other:

## Fix plan


## Prevention checklist

- [ ] Add RiskGate rule
- [ ] Add dry-run mode
- [ ] Add human approval gate
- [ ] Update data classification
- [ ] Add automation/check
- [ ] Update documentation
- [ ] Update quality gate

## Follow-up

- [ ] Fix completed
- [ ] Secrets rotated if needed
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Prevention added
- [ ] Fleet status updated
